html:
Exclusive to:

The Sawhorse is a craftable Structure and Crafting Station exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It requires 4 Boards and 4 Flint to craft after acquiring its Rare Blueprint from the Crabby Hermit by placing a Replica Relic Chair on the Hermit Island.

When standing near the Sawhorse, players are able to access to Carpentry Filter to prototype wooden furniture and decorations. Player can also use the Sawhorse to craft Bunch o' Boards, a recipe that gives 5 Boards for 20 Logs.

The Sawhorse can be upgraded using a Moon Glass Saw Blade. Upgrading the Sawhorse will unlock recipes for crafting stone furniture. It additionally unlocks the Bunch o' Stone recipe, which gives 5 Cut Stone for 15 Rocks.

Crafting Recipes

Carpentry Tier 1

  • Bunch o' Boards
  • Wooden Chair
  • Wooden Stool
  • Driftwood Rocker
  • Round Wooden Table
  • Square Wooden Table
  • Art?
  • Table Lamp
  • Table Vase
  • Empty Frame
  • Pleasant Portrait

Carpentry Tier 2

  • Bunch o' Stone
  • Stone Chair
  • Stone Stool
  • Stone Round Table
  • Stone Square Table

Tips

  • It is recommended to kill a Resting Horror in the Ruins while insane to get the Rare Blueprint for the Replica Relic Chair, since building one on the Hermit Island is the only way to get the Sawhorse Blueprint.
    • Alternatively, the Rare Blueprint for the Replica Relic Chair can also be obtained through the Ancient Chest; however, this process is often considered more complicated than killing a Resting Horror.
  • The Sawhorse makes a loud noise when a player is nearby, and as such it is advised to not have it in the main area of your base.

Trivia

  • The Sawhorse was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.

Gallery

  • Sawhorse Station Icon
  • Old Sawhorse Crafting Icon
  • Sawhorse in Crafting menu
  • Sawhorse Burned
  • Sawhorse concept art from Rhymes with Play
  • Upgraded Sawhorse concept art from Depths of Duplicity stream from Rhymes with Play.

“It makes furniture.”
–Wilson
“I love stuff made out of wood! It burns so well!”
–Willow
“Who mightier? Man or machine? Wrong. Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang
“Perhaps I could make something nice.”
–Wendy
“YOUR SAW WILL BE USEFUL IN THE MACHINE UPRISING”
–WX-78
“I could use a new reading chair.”
–Wickerbottom
“Don't worry Luce. She's got nothin' on ya.”
–Woodie
“I never cared for woodworking. The sawdust gets everywhere.”
–Maxwell
“A carpenter's saw is merely anöther blade för me tö master!”
–Wigfrid
“We'll be careful with the saw!”
–Webber
“A bit of furniture would be nice around here.”
–Warly
“Ooh, sharp”
–Wormwood
“I... love you.”
–Winona
“The mortal need to feel productive, if I may be so reductive.”
–Wortox
“Wood cutty thing!”
–Wurt
“Now I can work towards my carpentry badge!”
–Walter
“I like my furniture simple and functional.”
–Wanda
The Sawhorse is a craftable Structure and Crafting Station exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It requires 4 Boards and 4 Flint to craft after acquiring its Rare Blueprint from the Crabby Hermit by placing a Replica Relic Chair on the Hermit Island.
When standing near the Sawhorse, players are able to access to Carpentry Filter to prototype wooden furniture and decorations. Player can also use the Sawhorse to craft Bunch o' Boards, a recipe that gives 5 Boards for 20 Logs.
The Sawhorse can be upgraded using a Moon Glass Saw Blade. Upgrading the Sawhorse will unlock recipes for crafting stone furniture. It additionally unlocks the Bunch o' Stone recipe, which gives 5 Cut Stone for 15 Rocks.

It is recommended to kill a Resting Horror in the Ruins while insane to get the Rare Blueprint for the Replica Relic Chair, since building one on the Hermit Island is the only way to get the Sawhorse Blueprint.
Alternatively, the Rare Blueprint for the Replica Relic Chair can also be obtained through the Ancient Chest; however, this process is often considered more complicated than killing a Resting Horror.
The Sawhorse makes a loud noise when a player is nearby, and as such it is advised to not have it in the main area of your base.

The '''Sawhorse''' is a craftable [[Structure]] and [[Crafting Station]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It requires 4 [[Boards]] and 4 [[Flint]] to craft after acquiring its [[Blueprint/DST#Rare_Blueprint|Rare Blueprint]] from the [[Crabby Hermit]] by placing a [[Replica Relic Chair]] on the [[Hermit Island]].

When standing near the Sawhorse, players are able to access to [[Carpentry Filter]] to prototype wooden furniture and decorations. Player can also use the Sawhorse to craft '''Bunch o' Boards''', a recipe that gives 5 [[Boards]] for 20 [[Log]]s.

The Sawhorse can be upgraded using a [[Moon Glass Saw Blade]]. Upgrading the Sawhorse will unlock recipes for crafting stone furniture. It additionally unlocks the '''Bunch o' Stone''' recipe, which gives 5 [[Cut Stone]] for 15 [[Rocks]].
__NOTOC__
== {{pic|32|Sawhorse Station Icon}} Crafting Recipes ==
{{#lst:Carpentry Filter|Craftable Items}}

== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* It is recommended to kill a [[Resting Horror]] in the Ruins while [[Sanity|insane]] to get the Rare Blueprint for the Replica Relic Chair, since building one on the Hermit Island is the only way to get the Sawhorse Blueprint.
** Alternatively, the Rare Blueprint for the Replica Relic Chair can also be obtained through the [[Ancient Chest]]; however, this process is often considered more complicated than killing a Resting Horror.
* The Sawhorse makes a loud noise when a player is nearby, and as such it is advised to not have it in the main area of your base.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Sawhorse was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Host of Horrors|Host of Horrors]]'' update.
